chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P.No.D-3834 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.16735/2024 3. For hearing of main case 14.10.2025 Petitioner, Akhger Anwar Awan, present in person Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG --------- Petitioner present in person has prayed for setting aside of his removal via verbal order passed by the respondent No.2. This is a question of fact which cannot be decided in constitutional jurisdiction of this Court. As such, this petition is dismissed as not maintainable alongwith pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
